label: VoxCPM2 (oMLX, local)
note: VoxCPM2 supports 30 languages (ar/my/zh/da/nl/en/fi/fr/de/el/he/hi/id/it/ja/km/ko/lo/ms/no/pl/pt/ru/es/sw/sv/tl/th/tr/vi). Hungarian (hu) is NOT supported -- TTS will fall back to English for hu utterances on this engine. See app/language_map.py for the full list and per-language voice catalog.

fields.label: Voice
fields.help: VoxCPM2 currently exposes only its stock voice; voice cloning (ref_audio/ref_text) is supported by oMLX's endpoint but not wired up in this app yet.

fields.label: Style / delivery instructions
fields.help: Free-text style/delivery hint sent to the model (e.g. "speak warmly and a little slower"). Verified live to measurably change generated audio. This is the static fallback used until the translation LLM infers a live per-utterance tone.
